payload.note: The organization onboarding alert for APAMA MARITIME LTD resulted in an 'investigate_next_step' decision due to a hard contradiction in geography between the screened party's US location and the matched party's PA registration. Although there is support for the entity type as an organization and overlap in name tokens, several crucial pieces of information are missing or conflicting, necessitating further investigation to resolve discrepancies before closure.
evidence_summary: Name token overlap between screened and matched parties.
missing_information_summary: Additional corroboration to resolve country mismatch
